title.rendered: Custom UX/UI design for Power BI, Tableau, Qlik, SAP & Oracle BI

content.rendered:
Need a custom dashboard that seems unfeasible with your current BI setup? We’ve got the skills and experience to design & develop it. At Triolla, we make the impossible happen.

We are not a BI company, we’re a UX/UI agency specialize in dashboard design & complex data design simulations. Our selected partners are SolarEdge, Playtika, Taboola, Jfrog, Ichilov Hospital, Armis etc.

The Challenge:

Are you facing limitations with standard Tableau or Power BI dashboards?
Do you feel that your current data visualization lacks the depth and precision needed for impactful decision-making?

You’re not alone. Many BI professionals realize that these platforms, while powerful, often require a specialized touch to unlock their full potential.

Our Solution:

That’s where we come in. Our team of expert Data-Designers specializes in transforming your existing Tableau and Power BI platforms into bespoke, high-impact visual tools. We don’t just tweak existing templates: we revolutionize them.

 

What We Offer

Remember, we are not a BI company, we’re a UX/UI agency specialised in dashboard design, custom designs that go beyond the basics, tailored to your business’s unique data needs and aesthetic preferences.

Precision and Clarity: We turn complex data into clear, actionable insights, ensuring your team makes informed decisions quickly.

Collaborative Process: Our experts work closely with your team, blending our design expertise with your in-depth knowledge of your business.

Ongoing Support: We don’t just deliver and disappear. We offer continued support to evolve your dashboards as your business grows.

 

Why Choose Us?

Expertise in BI Platforms: Deep understanding of Tableau, Power BI or Qlik capabilities.
Proven Track Record: A portfolio of successful transformations for leading companies.
Client-Centric Approach: We prioritize your needs and goals at every step.
Testimonials:
Hear from our satisfied clients who have seen a transformative change in their decision-making process through our custom dashboard designs.

 

 

 

Let’s see if we can assist with your specific needs

Our experts are here to help with technicals, customized demos, pricing information and more capabilities.

 

[contact-form-7 id=”958e338″ title=”Post Contact Form”]
